title: Nuclear Fallout / Radiation Exposure
immediate_steps: Get inside a sturdy building immediately (basements or windowless center rooms are best)
Remove contaminated clothing and seal it in a plastic bag
Shower thoroughly with soap and warm water (do not scrub hard enough to break the skin)
Take Potassium Iodide (KI) pills ONLY if instructed by public health officials (protects the thyroid)
avoid: Do not use hair conditioner (it binds radioactive material to the hair)
Do not consume food or water that was exposed outside
Do not go outside until authorities announce it is safe
